payload:
# CravingsPH — Frontend UI Scaffold

## Objective

Scaffold the complete frontend for CravingsPH: all pages, components, route wirings, and state management across three portals (Customer, Owner, Admin) covering all 7 PRD phases. Use shadcn/ui with the established design system.

## Spec Directory

All design artifacts are in `specs/frontend-ui-scaffold/`:
- `design.md` — **primary reference**: routes, component trees, state, interfaces
- `plan.md` — 16-step implementation plan (follow in ... [truncated, 3171 chars total]

Completed Step 1a (route groups + layouts) and Step 1d (route config). Created (public), (owner), (admin) route groups with auth guards. Migrated (protected) to (owner). Updated app-routes.ts with all portal routes. Build and typecheck pass.

Completed Step 1b (brand components). Created back-button, cover-image, empty-state, required-badge, optional-badge in src/components/brand/. Build and typecheck pass. Task 1c (layout components) is next.

Completed Step 1c (layout components). Created customer-shell, customer-header, dashboard-shell, dashboard-navbar in src/components/layout/ plus OwnerSidebar and AdminSidebar colocated in route groups. Route group layouts now wire to their respective shells. Build and typecheck pass. Step 1 is fully complete — ready for Step 2.
